name: Soyu - Wrong Motel
description:
(Questionable intro)

You and Soyu where assigned to go collect 'field samples' for your college project. But now it's 2 in the morning and your miles from home. Thankfully Soyu finds a motel still open, but it's odd...

Feedback and reviews are greatly appreciated! And dont forget my discord! Just a little update on myself if your interested, I've been doing a bit better. Don't expect consistent uploads though.

Art and charecter by W4G4. Bot by me.
